Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The objective is to convert a raw Windows activity system log into a structured event log suitable for process mining This involves defining Case IDs Activity Names Timestamps and potentially other attributes while providing a rationale for the transformation logic

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Input Data Format CSV like structure Timestamp Action Type Attributes Content User interactions with various applications Word Chrome Acrobat Excel and specific windows documents emails Actions FOCUS TYPING SAVE SWITCH CLICK SCROLL HIGHLIGHT CLOSE Timeline A single morning session on 2024 12 11 08 59 to 09 08

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Determine Case Identification Strategy Option A Session based One case for the whole morning Option B Application based One case for Word one for Chrome etc Option C Document Task based Group events by the specific document or task being worked on

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analysis of the Log The user starts with Quarterly Report docx but immediately switches to Document1 docx They work on Document1 docx typing saving They switch to Chrome to handle an email regarding an Annual Meeting They switch to Acrobat to review Report Draft pdf They switch to Excel to update Budget 2024 xlsx They return to Document1 docx to add budget references save and close it They return to Quarterly Report docx type save and close it

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The most logical process here is the creation management of specific artifacts However there is a clear interdependency Document1 docx seems to be the central hub where information from Email Acrobat and Excel is aggregated

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Alternative Strategy Multi Case Lets define Cases based on the Primary Document being edited Case 1 Document1 docx The main drafting process Case 2 Quarterly Report docx A separate document worked on at the end Case 3 Budget 2024 xlsx Supporting task Case 4 Report Draft pdf Review task Case 5 Email Inbox Communication task

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Critique This fragments the timeline too much A user session is often one Case ID in digital footprint analysis

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Lets look at the Story The user is likely preparing a report Document1 docx seems to be a draft for a report Quarterly Report docx is another report

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Best Approach for Standard Tools Create one Case ID representing the Morning Work Session This allows the process miner to see the flow of activities across different applications as a single process flow

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Wait looking closer Process mining tools expect a Case ID that groups events belonging to the same business transaction If I group everything into one Case ID the process is just User works for 8 minutes

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Revised Approach Lets group by Document Artifact Lifecycle

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Case 1 Drafting Document1 docx This captures the core writing activity the interruptions email pdf excel and the finalization Case 2 Working on Quarterly Report docx This is a distinct artifact started at the beginning but abandoned then resumed

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Actually looking at the flow The Email PDF and Excel work happen during the lifecycle of Document1 They are support tasks for Document1

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Decision I will define Case 1 Document1 docx It includes the Email PDF and Excel events because they occur between the opening and closing of Document1 Decision I will define Case 2 Quarterly Report docx It includes the events at the start and end

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Wait this leaves the Budget PDF Email as orphan activities if I do not assign them I will assign them to Document1 because Document1 is the active document being built using these resources

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Assigning support tasks to the main document case is more analyst friendly than having 5 tiny cases

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: At 09 07 00 Document1 is closed At 09 07 15 Quarterly Report docx is focused This is a clear boundary

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So they belong to Case 1 This is the logic

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Activity Standardization FOCUS to Start Work TYPING to Edit SAVE to Save SWITCH to Context Switch CLICK to Read Email Draft Reply Send Email SCROLL and HIGHLIGHT to Review CLOSE to End Work

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This satisfies the Case equals Document instruction while preserving the context
